title: Chain 1/8: Halloween Costumes
scene: 十月底，你在派对用品店买万圣节服装。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 需要帮忙吗？今晚很多人买。
turns.en: Need help? It's busy tonight.

turns.cn: 有适合成人的吸血鬼套装吗？
turns.en: Do you have an adult vampire costume?

turns.cn: 中码在这，含披风和假牙。
turns.en: Medium is here. Cape and fangs included.
Do you sell face paint?
Aisle three. Get the waterproof kind.
I'll take a trick-or-treat bucket for my kid too.

title: Chain 2/8: Trick or Treat
scene: 万圣节晚上，孩子在你家门口讨糖。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Trick or treat!

turns.cn: 哇，好酷的宇航员！给你几块糖。
turns.en: Wow, cool astronaut! Here are some candies.
Thank you!

turns.cn: 记得只说一份，别拿太多哦。
turns.en: Just take one piece, okay?
Okay!

turns.cn: 晚上注意安全，让家长陪着。
turns.en: Stay safe tonight. Go with your parents.

title: Chain 3/8: Thanksgiving Invite
scene: 朋友邀请你感恩节去他家吃饭。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 感恩节来我家吧，火鸡管够。
turns.en: Come over for Thanksgiving. Plenty of turkey.
Thanks! What should I bring? Pumpkin pie?
Perfect. Come around three PM.
Need help with prep?
Just come early to help set the table.

title: Chain 4/8: Thanksgiving Dinner
scene: 感恩节你去朋友家，帮忙准备晚餐。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 火鸡还要烤一小时，先喝点？
turns.en: The turkey needs another hour. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 好的，我能帮忙摆桌子吗？
turns.en: Sure. Can I help set the table?
Silverware is in the cabinet. We need eight places.
I brought pumpkin pie. Where should I put it?

turns.cn: 厨房岛台，等会儿一起切。
turns.en: On the kitchen island. We'll slice it later.
It smells amazing in here.

title: Chain 5/8: Black Friday Plans
scene: 感恩节饭后，朋友聊第二天黑五抢购。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Black Friday tomorrow. Are you lining up?

turns.cn: 网上买就行，不想凌晨排队。
turns.en: I'll shop online. No dawn lines for me.
TVs are half off. I'm tempted.

turns.cn: 记得比价，有时候网上更便宜。
turns.en: Compare prices. Sometimes online is cheaper.
Good point. I'll check.

title: Chain 6/8: Christmas Shopping
scene: 十二月在商场买圣诞礼物。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Would you like gift wrapping?
Yes, please. It's a scarf for my mom.
Red ribbon or gold?
Gold. Can you write a gift card?

turns.cn: 当然可以，请把祝福语告诉我。
turns.en: Sure. Tell me what to write.
Write Merry Christmas, love you.

title: Chain 7/8: Christmas Party
scene: 公司圣诞派对，你和同事聊天。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Who did you get for Secret Santa?
Can't say. Twenty-dollar limit.
I got a mug. Practical.
What time is the gift exchange?
Eight. Dinner first.
Looking forward to it.

title: Chain 8/8: New Year Wishes
scene: 跨年夜，你和朋友说新年计划。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 新年快乐！明年有什么打算？
turns.en: Happy New Year! Any resolutions?
Exercise more, sleep earlier. You?

turns.cn: 学一门新技能，也许吉他。
turns.en: Learn something new. Maybe guitar.
Go for it. We'll check in a year.
Deal. Happy New Year!
Happy New Year!
